## Suggested Repository Description

```
Modern portfolio with Three.js 3D Earth, AI-powered RAG search, and zero-build architecture. Deployed on Cloudflare Pages with 95+ Lighthouse score. Features vanilla JavaScript, Web Components, and edge-first deployment.
```

## Social Preview Image

Recommended: 1280x640px image showcasing the 3D Earth visualization
Path: `.github/social-preview.png`
